# X

As the platform’s ad repository only includes data from ads served to users
    in the European Union (X Business, n.d.), this item does not apply to the assessment
    of transparency and data access in the Brazilian context.The X Ads Repository includes a graphical user interface that allows users
    to extract advertising content data, but it is limited to ads served to users
    within the European Union (X Ads Repository, n.d.).The platform provides an API to access its ad repository, but it only includes
    data from ads served to users in the European Union. The X Ads Repository, launched
    in 2023 to comply with the Digital Services Act (DSA), does not include data from
    other regions (X Business, n.d.).
